3d5d35d79ad1bf83.label: The universe is one connected whole
3d5d35d79ad1bf83.desc: Everything that exists forms a single ordered, living system governed by one reason, so each part is bound to and follows from every other.

b53897cf9ef7305e.label: Repay wrong with generosity
b53897cf9ef7305e.desc: Instead of retaliating, hoarding, or excusing yourself, give freely, forgive, repent, and treat others' dignity and property as your own.

b8c2fb4612cb63d9.label: Suffering comes from your judgments
b8c2fb4612cb63d9.desc: Events themselves cannot harm you; distress arises from the opinions you add to them, and you can withhold those opinions and simply act rightly now.

b9f3902ecabacec3.label: Wrongdoing destroys the wrongdoer
b9f3902ecabacec3.desc: Good and evil rebound on the person who does them, so the wicked are trapped by their own schemes while the upright endure.

238b01f6f4e45ba3.label: Ultimate reality escapes the senses
238b01f6f4e45ba3.desc: What underlies everything cannot be seen, argued to, or thought, and is found only by turning attention inward or entering the standpoint of what is observed.

ff9543adb63d2538.label: Giving multiplies, hoarding wastes
ff9543adb63d2538.desc: Wealth held back or endlessly craved rots and yields nothing, while what is shared, used, and worked for sustains both giver and community.

a1791cc723a07ca4.label: Love is the highest path
a1791cc723a07ca4.desc: Wholehearted love, not sentiment but self-surrender and devotion to what cannot die, is the instrument through which ultimate reality is known and reached.

07802a7c9f5dd945.label: Speak, listen, or walk away
07802a7c9f5dd945.desc: Words are wasted on those who will not hear and withheld wrongly from those who would, so live what you profess and leave company that cannot be reached.

4d33ea8ead7bb290.label: Keep worthy company, act sincerely
4d33ea8ead7bb290.desc: Ground yourself in loyalty and honesty, treat everyone with the respect you would give an honored guest, and attach yourself to good people.

bccf6e38f7f0f9a3.label: Character shows without display
bccf6e38f7f0f9a3.desc: A settled person embodies their principles rather than talking about them, stays inwardly content and unshaken, and does good without seeking notice.

89e5c34105deb907.label: Understanding frees you from death
89e5c34105deb907.desc: What becomes of you after death follows from what you have done and understood, and realizing the deathless reality releases you from the cycle of rebirth.

4ec36f7175d0ce80.label: Character outranks worldly success
4ec36f7175d0ce80.desc: The good person is unmoved by praise or blame and cares for principle, while the petty person chases comfort and favor and steadily declines.

40c4c7c0321c96c1.label: The mind rules the body
40c4c7c0321c96c1.desc: You are not your body, senses, or feelings but the ruling mind, which harms itself only by its own judgments and is your best friend when governed.

61f19049374e86b9.label: Choose pleasure by clear judgment
61f19049374e86b9.desc: Pleasure and pain touch only the senses, so weigh them by what they lead to rather than by how they feel, and let no craving disturb the governing mind.

c6ef863019ea9dbb.label: Ignored warnings bring their reckoning
c6ef863019ea9dbb.desc: Those who mock, dismiss, or joke away the truth are abandoned to the consequences of their own deeds, which rise up to surround them.

e9adddb50d23c496.label: Wisdom is worth more than wealth
e9adddb50d23c496.desc: Wisdom is the one possession that repays every cost paid for it, outlasting money, pleasure, and status.

30fea2086decd774.label: Power works through yielding
30fea2086decd774.desc: Real influence comes from taking no credit, forcing nothing, and staying low, because opposites define each other and the soft outlasts the hard.

add7898dec7dc4b4.label: What you receive, you owe
add7898dec7dc4b4.desc: Anyone who accepts mercy, patience, or a benefit and then refuses to extend it forfeits what they were given, and no commitment is real unless you carry its full cost yourself.

882ad250758db7de.label: Accept events, act rightly anyway
882ad250758db7de.desc: Whatever happens serves the whole and cannot stop you from being just, so meet each circumstance as the material your reason and kindness are given to work with.

862a4a8f83af57fb.label: Real knowledge hides in plain sight
862a4a8f83af57fb.desc: What is most worth knowing is concealed from the powerful and the confident, and is often already present inside the person who claims not to have it.

5759819d544e7eea.label: Lasting joy comes from within
5759819d544e7eea.desc: Deep and unlosable delight is found in the self, in doing good, and in attentive reflection, not in pleasures that can be taken away.

6063d48bb4d441d4.label: Nothing substitutes for the real thing
6063d48bb4d441d4.desc: A thing has a definite nature that makes it what it is, and once that quality is gone no imitation, argument, or replacement will serve.

6da940df7ae8ee37.label: No one escapes final accounting
6da940df7ae8ee37.desc: Every person will be judged by a reckoning that cannot be bribed, evaded, or transferred to anyone else, with their own record standing as the witness.

a411c120335ce966.label: Study to become better, not impressive
a411c120335ce966.desc: Learning is worthless as ornament or credential and only counts when it changes the character of the person doing it.

59159ed1d31ecaa1.label: Character shows in sustained conduct
59159ed1d31ecaa1.desc: Genuine goodness reveals itself through humility, reliability in small things, and steadiness maintained over long stretches rather than in bursts.

8d2eb2cab1f63982.label: Learning is renewed and handed on
8d2eb2cab1f63982.desc: Knowledge is passed down, fades, and must be recovered, so the real teacher turns the old into something new and the real student surpasses the teacher.

527814e022929613.label: Integrity outlasts dishonest wealth
527814e022929613.desc: Money got by greed, bribery, or exploitation collapses on the person who holds it, while honest poverty and generous giving steadily build a life worth having.

bda066ee67fd9478.label: Everything perishes, even your name
bda066ee67fd9478.desc: Bodies, fortunes, cities, and the memory of the dead all dissolve, so nothing worldly deserves to be clung to.

00412c1b9e6972f1.label: Do good without seeking credit
00412c1b9e6972f1.desc: A good act is already its own complete reward, so demanding recognition, repayment, or gratitude cancels its worth.

2f13b59b42cd44f3.label: Rulers lead by self-restraint
2f13b59b42cd44f3.desc: Authority holds only when the ruler corrects himself first, provides for the people, uses capable subordinates, and governs so lightly that force is unnecessary.

6b604958c7e4d034.label: Denying truth to protect yourself
6b604958c7e4d034.desc: People reject a message not because the evidence fails but because accepting it would cost them something, so they invent charges of trickery, madness, or forgery to excuse themselves.

d964074ea362885e.label: Marks of the truly noble
d964074ea362885e.desc: The genuinely noble person is the one who has cut every attachment, let anger and pride fall away, wants nothing from any world, and reached the end of suffering.

1e758de852b75b42.label: Guard what you say
1e758de852b75b42.desc: Careless and excessive speech traps and destroys the speaker, while restraint, accuracy, and weight in words protect a life and reveal wisdom.

d8fa8c19412988b7.label: Judge others gently
d8fa8c19412988b7.desc: Someone who wrongs you acts on what looks right to him and harms himself by his error, so examine your own faults, withhold confident verdicts, and pity rather than resent him.

4c5e3c1837f06cff.label: Freedom from craving
4c5e3c1837f06cff.desc: Letting go of desire, doubt, attachment, and the sense of "mine" releases a person from suffering and fear here and now.

c4596b26e3d55b2a.label: Faith proved by conduct
c4596b26e3d55b2a.desc: What counts is acting rightly and following what you know to be true, since outward profession, birth, and rules mean nothing without deeds behind them.

a5de8c2b1b87a67f.label: The wise and the foolish
a5de8c2b1b87a67f.desc: The wise take advice, restrain their anger, and hold knowledge back for the right moment, while fools trust themselves, broadcast their folly, and talk their way into ruin.

9add3833b3e6539b.label: Wisdom holds opposites together
9add3833b3e6539b.desc: Reality moves by reversal and balance, so what is grasped is lost, what is reduced grows, and understanding shows itself in restraint rather than argument or control.

3c47b022c054eb76.label: Achievement without meaning is empty
3c47b022c054eb76.desc: Wealth, long life, knowledge, and everything a person builds are worth nothing without love, satisfaction, and understanding of what one is for.

2c4dd7c8d2e6200a.label: Peace of the settled mind
2c4dd7c8d2e6200a.desc: Those who govern themselves and accept whatever befalls them find a lasting contentment that neither sorrow nor joy can disturb.

9156e1051302d656.label: Everything is one reality
9156e1051302d656.desc: Every god, force, and living thing is an aspect of a single underlying reality that contains all things, dwells in every heart, and is not contained by anything.

c349e85badfca88b.label: Creation points to its source
c349e85badfca88b.desc: The order of nature, the making of the human body, and everything that exists bear witness to a single creating power for anyone willing to reflect.

a76daaed52b215d8.label: Your deeds return to you
a76daaed52b215d8.desc: What a person gives, endures, or inflicts comes back to them multiplied, and no one is defrauded of what their actions have earned.

d3f84d4c8bee12fe.label: Hold on to wisdom
d3f84d4c8bee12fe.desc: Acquire understanding above everything else, accept instruction rather than refusing it, and guard good teaching until it becomes part of you.

f02f16b11066616e.label: Death is nothing to fear
f02f16b11066616e.desc: Death is a natural process stripped of the terrors we add to it, so fear disgrace instead, live as though each moment could be the last, and hold to virtue.

90d1b04efa9fee52.label: Wisdom is taught and received
90d1b04efa9fee52.desc: Wisdom passes from teacher to willing listener through well-timed, gracious speech, and it takes root in whoever seeks it and stores it up.

634d39b88fd904be.label: Blind to your own faults
634d39b88fd904be.desc: People see others' small flaws clearly while hiding and rationalizing their own much larger ones, and self-improvement begins with looking inward instead of outward.

b15663e206f9a350.label: Everything changes and dissolves
b15663e206f9a350.desc: Nature endlessly transforms the same matter into new forms, so nothing is truly lost, nothing is new, and death is neither strange nor to be feared.

0a943ad7c4ff1128.label: A community bound by something greater
0a943ad7c4ff1128.desc: People with different gifts form one body held together by a shared source larger than any of them, and small hidden influences slowly transform the whole.

e9eccb05444ae542.label: Real virtue over its appearance
e9eccb05444ae542.desc: Practicing goodness requires counting its real cost and doing what your nature demands whether or not anyone sees, rather than performing seriousness for an audience.

8ce8b02e43ce1311.label: Unchecked desire destroys you
8ce8b02e43ce1311.desc: Appetite, arrogance, and the pursuit of pleasure without restraint obscure a person's judgment and ruin the very one who indulges them.

766d14e7e9df5fe2.label: Guard what enters your mind
766d14e7e9df5fe2.desc: Watch your thoughts and impulses closely, refuse to be jerked around by anger, craving, or dread, and let nothing outside you take the place of what matters most.

cb7eafb66203ff6a.label: Act without attachment to results
cb7eafb66203ff6a.desc: Work done as an offering, without ego or grasping at outcomes, binds no one, and nothing external can harm a person who offers it nothing to seize.

964f034decef39cc.label: Wrongdoing harms the wrongdoer most
964f034decef39cc.desc: The harm a person plots for others originates in himself, corrupts him, and returns to destroy him.

59286230d2a0f846.label: Things you must not do
59286230d2a0f846.desc: Refuse to scheme against the trusting, gloat over an enemy's fall, envy those who prosper by force, or let others pressure you into softening what is right.

8e5f964d9b596a16.label: Honesty and humility bring standing
8e5f964d9b596a16.desc: Integrity, humility, and welcoming correction protect a person and earn real honor, while arrogance, malice, and deceit bring collapse and disgrace.

208a335b6df702d2.label: Judge effort against real conditions
208a335b6df702d2.desc: Effective action means reckoning the full cost beforehand, respecting the limits of your competence and the timing of circumstances, and neither overshooting nor falling short.

20700258c5b3db71.label: Train attention through steady practice
20700258c5b3db71.desc: Repeatedly returning the wandering mind to one thing, in the right conditions and with disciplined speech and action, brings a steady joy nothing external can reach.

29de2ffa91689c54.label: The humble are lifted up
29de2ffa91689c54.desc: Those who exalt themselves and refuse uncomfortable truth are brought low, while the humble, the merciful, and the powerless are vindicated and given rest.

b32a3d86ed9211e2.label: Do the work in front of you
b32a3d86ed9211e2.desc: Live each moment doing your present task honestly, sociably, and without vanity or complaint, since nothing outside you can prevent you from being good.

8971e6232eff6ebd.label: Craving traps and multiplies
8971e6232eff6ebd.desc: Unchecked desire spreads on its own, binds a person like a snare, and must be uprooted rather than fed.

be751935795f7e1f.label: Do each act well
be751935795f7e1f.desc: Treat every action, however small, with seriousness, justice, and goodwill toward others, without needing praise for it.

aab23319ce5f4249.label: Lead by moral example
aab23319ce5f4249.desc: Good government works through the ruler's own uprightness and kindness extended outward, not through force or fear of punishment.

55df603a4d8805c8.label: Hostility reveals the hostile
55df603a4d8805c8.desc: When people mock, slander, or attack you for standing by what is right, their opposition exposes their own character rather than discrediting you.

44767c1e3f295788.label: Inner calm draws people
44767c1e3f295788.desc: Settled, gentle, unforced character is its own strength, and others are naturally drawn to rest near it.

adf10488ed13463f.label: Appetite consumes its own reward
adf10488ed13463f.desc: Greed, idleness, and pleasure-seeking leave a person unable to enjoy or keep what they spend their life acquiring.

563c4e4dbf7f3e18.label: Ignored warnings become judgment
563c4e4dbf7f3e18.desc: People who dismiss a warning and turn from the truth condemn themselves by their own deeds when the reckoning comes.

19145a9ed14368ec.label: Good thought becomes good action
19145a9ed14368ec.desc: Genuine devotion shows itself as a good mind, true words, and generous work that build a just order in the world.

a689fc96b63fb6d6.label: Deeds prove the faith
a689fc96b63fb6d6.desc: Everyone answers for what they actually do, so sincere trust must show itself in conduct rather than in profession or fair-weather appeals.

096a268270fb0982.label: One reality behind everything
096a268270fb0982.desc: All things, gods, and forms arise from and are sustained by a single boundless source that contains them yet is contained by nothing.

92f76a4ead862af7.label: Seeing yourself in everything
92f76a4ead862af7.desc: Recognizing one and the same life in all beings dissolves ignorance, steadies a person through gain and loss, and is what sets them free.

490fcd1277832413.label: Wise speech, willing correction
490fcd1277832413.desc: Wisdom shows itself in restrained, well-timed speech and in gladly accepting rebuke.

ed5af2706037685f.label: Count the cost first
ed5af2706037685f.desc: Weigh honestly what an undertaking demands and what you can bear before committing, since courage outruns capacity and results take time.

0a35f9122dcb7107.label: Value what cannot be seized
0a35f9122dcb7107.desc: Grasping, display, and accumulation destroy what they reach for, while character, understanding, and restraint hold their worth.

88180800cfcb67b7.label: Reputation is worth nothing
88180800cfcb67b7.desc: What matters is acting as your nature requires now, not the approval of people who cannot themselves live well.

42b2622e79feae47.label: What makes a good person
42b2622e79feae47.desc: Genuine character shows in steady, sincere, upright conduct that earns respect anywhere and over a lifetime rather than in bursts.

f11eb1c8ca7dd440.label: Wrongdoing harms the wrongdoer
f11eb1c8ca7dd440.desc: Harm done to others rebounds on the person who does it, corrupting them and leaving inescapable regret and suffering.

a99d74f11b0068f2.label: Losing the self reveals reality
a99d74f11b0068f2.desc: When a person empties the mind of self-consciousness and stops clinging to body and appearances, they perceive an undying reality that frees them from death and from the pull of pleasure and pain.

7ab22795105bad20.label: Real knowing surpasses claiming knowledge
7ab22795105bad20.desc: True understanding comes through inner insight rather than accumulation or argument, and those who claim to know it do not while those who sense its depth do.

5251e8337ab38ed5.label: Good deeds bring lasting reward
5251e8337ab38ed5.desc: Right action and right belief produce a good that endures, bringing peace and prosperity now and lasting joy afterward.

72f889db6b5115d7.label: Live by your rational nature
72f889db6b5115d7.desc: Do your own work according to reason, accept whatever the universe assigns, and treat all people as limbs of one body, since that is what human nature requires.

bc5a7a2d476e34fb.label: Handling fools and angry power
bc5a7a2d476e34fb.desc: Fools, hot tempers, and abusive power cause harm that cannot be argued away, so respond with composure, restraint, and generosity rather than confrontation.

ba9b239e6176d03d.label: Understand things as they are
ba9b239e6176d03d.desc: Examine each thing and each person for what they actually are — their substance, purpose, limits, and beliefs — rather than reacting to appearances or accepting common meanings.

00f0158c24cb3c6d.label: Uselessness has hidden value
00f0158c24cb3c6d.desc: What seems useless or too large to matter is preserved and grows great, while usefulness attracts exploitation and early ruin.

11fc94cfe9346edc.label: Accounting for what's entrusted
11fc94cfe9346edc.desc: People receive resources and responsibilities suited to their capacity and will be held to account for how they used them.

375628fc189a24c0.label: One reality underlies everything
375628fc189a24c0.desc: A single order, life, or intelligence unifies all beings, so the self is deeper than body and mind and to see that sameness is wisdom.

e2c07578d521dd74.label: The good and petty compared
e2c07578d521dd74.desc: Character, not talent or success, separates the admirable person, who is steady, modest, and dignified, from the petty one, who is arrogant, flattering, and self-serving.

2d0ceddb404795ff.label: Learning to become better
2d0ceddb404795ff.desc: Real study aims at self-improvement and practice rather than reputation, joins old knowledge to new, and requires seriousness, humility, and principled companions.

f517065be3c9eef9.label: Truth endures, lies collapse
f517065be3c9eef9.desc: Honest speech protects and outlasts, while deceit and false witness eventually destroy those who rely on them.

106db3a62c71e139.label: Inner freedom from desire
106db3a62c71e139.desc: The truly good person is content within, free of craving, anger, and self-love, and remains unmoved by fortune, grief, or delight.

77183ffd323da1df.label: Freedom from all attachment
77183ffd323da1df.desc: True nobility is measured by inner freedom — from anger, craving, pride, and every bond — not by birth or status.

7191ffda7fa92b37.label: Avoid harming and envying others
7191ffda7fa92b37.desc: Do not scheme, retaliate, envy, or imitate those who prosper through wrongdoing, but hold steadily to what you know is right.

06f2789863d4a555.label: Wrongdoers destroy themselves
06f2789863d4a555.desc: Greed, arrogance, and the corruption of others rebound on the people who indulge them, blinding and ruining them from within.

32e93d775e54e2ba.label: Wisdom is worth everything
32e93d775e54e2ba.desc: Wisdom protects, heals, and enriches the one who pursues it, and should be sought above comfort, wealth, and honor.

f37db6392695ff04.label: Reality exceeds words and concepts
f37db6392695ff04.desc: The ultimate ground of things cannot be named, perceived, or captured in language, and opposites like subject and object only arise from a partial view.

e1febd30d262ad6b.label: What lasts and what passes
e1febd30d262ad6b.desc: Bodies, possessions, and entire orders decay, while goodness, moral law, and what binds people to something larger outlast them.

3d1925bb3e77403f.label: Suffering comes from judgment
3d1925bb3e77403f.desc: Nothing external can harm you; distress arises only from the opinions your mind accepts about events, and it can withhold them.

4a4d2e623ad2d8ae.label: Everything constantly transforms
4a4d2e623ad2d8ae.desc: Nature endlessly reshapes the same matter into new forms, so change and loss are not evils but the way the whole sustains itself.

fae754ca65d37271.label: Death levels everyone equally
fae754ca65d37271.desc: The powerful, famous, and celebrated all die, are forgotten, and dissolve into their components exactly as everyone else does.

635e6a6fe5612281.label: No one can be rescued
635e6a6fe5612281.desc: On the day of reckoning nothing external — wealth, kin, rank, or cleverness — can save a person; only their own deeds and inner integrity stand.

5901b4d863d4fa21.label: Nature points to its maker
5901b4d863d4fa21.desc: The order of sky, earth, rain, and living creatures is evidence of the single power that made and sustains everything, for anyone willing to reflect.

0a2cc43d7b1fc95a.label: Leaders must first be good
0a2cc43d7b1fc95a.desc: Legitimate authority rests on the ruler's own cultivation, restraint, and promotion of upright people rather than on force or display.

8089c49d4a4ea0b4.label: Degrees of guilt and blame
8089c49d4a4ea0b4.desc: Culpability depends on knowledge, intent, and what a person was entrusted with, and wrongdoing rebounds on the one who commits it.

961baa57c820707c.label: Do not fear death
961baa57c820707c.desc: Since death is inevitable and unknowable, clinging to life is pointless, and only living well in the time you have is worth caring about.

5a815780b1f8abe1.label: Wealth tests your character
5a815780b1f8abe1.desc: Riches deceive, corrupt judgment, and vanish at death, while generosity and honest dealing build a life that lasts.

cfb5e9e6b429ca5d.label: Love as the highest path
cfb5e9e6b429ca5d.desc: Love, given wholly and selflessly, is what unites a person with ultimate reality and outweighs knowledge, ritual, and eloquence.

2124b80db9e9eec2.label: Act without seeking reward
2124b80db9e9eec2.desc: Duty performed sincerely and without any eye on gain, reputation, or results is the only kind that counts, while outward observance without inner truth is empty.

a4e470f455a559d6.label: Wisdom versus foolishness
a4e470f455a559d6.desc: The wise take counsel, restrain anger, and act on knowledge, while fools trust themselves, parade their folly, and destroy what they have.

73e39e1da80a3aa2.label: Freedom through releasing craving
73e39e1da80a3aa2.desc: Letting go of desire, fear, pride, and the sense of ownership frees a person from suffering here and now.

61e8c954fc6a3981.label: Integrity outlasts corruption
61e8c954fc6a3981.desc: Upright living protects and sustains a person while wickedness eventually destroys the one who practices it.

4f2b05e242c3a274.label: Your mind cannot be harmed
4f2b05e242c3a274.desc: Nothing external can prevent you from judging rightly and acting justly, so your happiness rests entirely in your own control.

4d9d243f8656e8bf.label: Meet wrongdoing with understanding
4d9d243f8656e8bf.desc: People who wrong you act from ignorance about what is truly good, so pity and correct them rather than resent them, and check whether you share the same fault.

a92c07503639c059.label: Excuses forfeit what matters
a92c07503639c059.desc: People decline the thing of greatest importance by pleading obligations and refusing costs, and in refusing they lose their claim to it.

d1d3e2e5d6cfbb3d.label: Pleasure needs careful measure
d1d3e2e5d6cfbb3d.desc: Pleasure is not simply good or bad, and true happiness comes from freedom from pain and disturbance rather than from indulging every desire.

8e628a6607cee345.label: Rules for daily conduct
8e628a6607cee345.desc: Fix your character in advance and hold it everywhere by speaking little, refusing flattery, choosing your company carefully, and showing your principles through action rather than argument.

e55fb1e8263ad9e3.label: Many paths to the eternal
e55fb1e8263ad9e3.desc: The ultimate reality is grasped not by ritual or study but through devotion and inward contemplation, and it can be reached by many different routes.

cc571e1266de90ed.label: Living in view of death
cc571e1266de90ed.desc: Remembering that life is brief and death natural frees you to spend the present acting justly, bearing what comes, and letting go without struggle.

67e3b1cd60202eef.label: Pride blocks understanding
67e3b1cd60202eef.desc: People reject truth because it is unfamiliar or unwelcome or comes from someone they think they know, and their dismissal exposes their own arrogance rather than any flaw in the message.

f467939486adac17.label: Without self-mastery you are defenseless
f467939486adac17.desc: A person who has not disciplined their impulses is at the mercy of their own cravings and collapses under temptation or hardship.

60b1edf5b30794d9.label: Acting on what you learn
60b1edf5b30794d9.desc: Knowledge proves itself in practice, and the one who hears and then does is fundamentally different from the one who merely hears.

ee45bffe5038c0f9.label: Deeds return to their doer
ee45bffe5038c0f9.desc: Those who mock warnings, deny the truth, and wrong others are condemned by their own accumulated actions, and no excuse, ally, or false object of worship will shield them.

3eaf701ed50dc959.label: Give up less for more
3eaf701ed50dc959.desc: Surrender lesser goods — possessions, status, even life itself — rather than let attachment to them ruin your character, since a brief life offers no better trade.

8a470767b2cff829.label: One reality behind everything
8a470767b2cff829.desc: A single, formless source dwells in all things and contains every god, creature, and form, while remaining beyond all of them.

acd51962667f0ddd.label: Wisdom is the greatest possession
acd51962667f0ddd.desc: Understanding protects, heals, and sustains whoever holds it, and is worth more than any wealth you could acquire or give away.

2c74722a129b0d9e.label: Receive and pass on teaching
2c74722a129b0d9e.desc: Genuine learning means listening humbly, absorbing what is taught, and transmitting it onward so it lives in others.

03b831dda147a034.label: Craving leads to ruin
03b831dda147a034.desc: Desire clouds judgment, drives people to act against their own will, and grows into wrongdoing, suffering, and death.

ae331cda67a049b6.label: The wise and the foolish
ae331cda67a049b6.desc: Wisdom shows itself in restraint, listening, and quiet competence, while folly displays itself loudly and repeats its own mistakes.

332262c3e5bbd017.label: Act without seeking reward
332262c3e5bbd017.desc: What counts is doing the thing itself, unattached to praise or payoff, since acts done for reward yield only that reward and professed belief without action is empty.

7ad19ad5d7b20575.label: Vindication comes to the faithful
7ad19ad5d7b20575.desc: Those slandered and rejected for holding to truth are steadied in the present and eventually honored, while forgiveness and restoration remain open to whoever turns back.

dde8e39cc38c6142.label: A community united in purpose
dde8e39cc38c6142.desc: People flourish when they gather in sincere accord, set aside self-seeking and faction, and serve, teach, and build together.

db87440f837f525c.label: Integrity outlasts corruption
db87440f837f525c.desc: Right action preserves a person and rebounds to their benefit, while wrongdoing destroys the one who does it, however long it appears to prosper.

7475bf4912fb5dac.label: Power tests a ruler's character
7475bf4912fb5dac.desc: Authority is legitimate only when the powerful restrain themselves, hear the truth, and provide for the people, and it becomes predation when they do not.

42c59d182ce54cb4.label: Understanding cannot be forced
42c59d182ce54cb4.desc: Real comprehension is received by a learner who strains toward it and is disclosed through a teacher, not seized by argument, claimed as mastery, or imposed on the unready.

b1e5834e4a12f3d5.label: Discipline without excess
b1e5834e4a12f3d5.desc: Steady practice means neither indulging nor punishing yourself, refusing to complain about circumstance, and counting the cost before you commit.

79cbe9a72878517c.label: The ultimate escapes all description
79cbe9a72878517c.desc: What is finally real cannot be seen, argued to, named, certified, or captured in any doctrine, and anyone claiming to have attained it has not.

077c26d2f5f28bf3.label: The mind wounds or heals itself
077c26d2f5f28bf3.desc: Attention turned outward onto other people's business and external puzzles corrodes the soul, while turning inward toward what one loves transforms even fear and pain into growth.

578a1485b3e99963.label: Small beginnings become vast ends
578a1485b3e99963.desc: Creation and moral life alike work by growth from tiny or hidden starts, so a thing must be judged by what it will become and by what it actually yields.

aafd1c45d2ac8254.label: Restrain anger, honor others
aafd1c45d2ac8254.desc: Deal with other people gently and humbly — listening more than speaking, refusing retaliation, holding their dignity as precious as your own — because you cannot foresee your own reckoning.

afb917ec0681b8d6.label: Grasping destroys what it seizes
afb917ec0681b8d6.desc: Real worth lies in understanding, restraint, and integrity that cannot be seized, handed over, or held, and the harder a person clutches at possession or perfection the more surely it slips away.

0be595cba73782f3.label: Speech makes or ruins you
0be595cba73782f3.desc: What a person says returns upon them: honest, sparing speech rescues and heals, while reckless, flattering, or slanderous words trap and destroy the one who utters them.

695b641b3b307688.label: Unwavering commitment cannot be shaken
695b641b3b307688.desc: A person whose attention and purpose stay fixed on what is true cannot be moved off course by any crisis, threat, or passage of time.

8429de9cbd9e1b77.label: Greatness shows itself in service
8429de9cbd9e1b77.desc: Real standing belongs to those who act before they speak, take on the lowest tasks, prove faithful in small things, and lift up those beneath them — knowing an accounting will come.

a094cbf6f74e7b6b.label: People reject unwelcome truth
a094cbf6f74e7b6b.desc: When a message contradicts what people want or expect, they invent charges of magic, madness, or fable rather than judge it honestly, and so turn themselves away from what they already half know.

953355424355b174.label: Accept the order governing everything
953355424355b174.desc: A rational, just power runs through the universe and sets each life's limits, so every obstacle becomes material for right action and nothing that happens gives cause for complaint.

09ceacb7f5d83412.label: Lead by example, not force
09ceacb7f5d83412.desc: Rulers who govern through their own uprightness, generosity, and trust in capable people give the people a conscience, whereas law and punishment only teach evasion without shame.

c3436db04c6a1c0f.label: Unchecked appetite consumes people
c3436db04c6a1c0f.desc: Those who indulge greed, power, pleasure, or resentment without inner discipline destroy themselves, ruined by the very things they thought they controlled.

50a94c27f0b2c8f3.label: Pray to become genuinely useful
50a94c27f0b2c8f3.desc: The truest prayer asks not for blessings but to be purified and made an instrument of good — a source of mercy, peace, and knowledge for others.

9896cf61594d06ae.label: Doing good yields lasting joy
9896cf61594d06ae.desc: Delight comes from enjoying what is honestly one's own and from being a source of gladness to others, and this joy cannot be taken away because the good done is never lost.

3f80633f46a88659.label: Your judgments, not events, disturb you
3f80633f46a88659.desc: Nothing outside the mind can harm it, so a mind that drops its judgments, holds nothing, and stays empty and responsive keeps its peace through any circumstance.

c3ce5e9c3beba224.label: Love unites us with reality
c3ce5e9c3beba224.desc: Love that seeks the beloved's good rather than one's own feeling purifies the lover, is the instrument by which the deepest truths are known, and alone survives when everything else passes.

33bda952fa998978.label: Integrity in serving power
33bda952fa998978.desc: Whether leading or serving under someone, a person's authority and worth come from upright conduct — obeying what is right, opposing wrong openly, and stepping away rather than complying with injustice.

1b3f856985d33ba4.label: Inner change spreads outward
1b3f856985d33ba4.desc: People who are genuinely transformed and united in love become sources of light that spread what they know to everyone around them.

23a9ffe4c82f7b90.label: Wrongdoing destroys the wrongdoer
23a9ffe4c82f7b90.desc: Cruelty, greed, arrogance, and corrupting others rebound on the person who commits them and ruin their own life.

f5f7ff9bc52214d8.label: Freedom through releasing craving
f5f7ff9bc52214d8.desc: Letting go of desire, fear, anger, and the sense of "mine" ends suffering and brings a fearless, unshakable calm here and now.

5218ec88d772871a.label: Suffering without reaching arrival
5218ec88d772871a.desc: Many people struggle, long, and die without ever reaching what they sought, and nothing they appeal to for rescue has the power to help them.

7f5d6b1acee982e7.label: See your own fault first
7f5d6b1acee982e7.desc: When someone wrongs you, recognize their error as ignorance, look for the same fault in yourself, and respond with pity rather than resentment or condemnation.

2b5586d0095666d3.label: Giving what you owe
2b5586d0095666d3.desc: Withholding earned rewards, clinging to possessions, or giving for show all corrupt the giver, since what you cling to was never truly yours.

f70d71d0f1d9e2dc.label: Outcomes are neither good nor bad
f70d71d0f1d9e2dc.desc: Nothing that can happen equally to good and bad people is really good or bad; worth lies in a thing's own nature, not in results, praise, or blame.

62fc5221d658e655.label: Judge actions, withhold verdicts
62fc5221d658e655.desc: Assess people by what they actually do now rather than by their reputation, their misfortune, or your assumption that they did wrong.

7b4d7eec184376f1.label: The divine exceeds all description
7b4d7eec184376f1.desc: Ultimate reality is boundless and only known fully by itself; no words, scriptures, or beings can ever adequately describe it.

40c5361af01cf4db.label: Break each thing down
40c5361af01cf4db.desc: Meet whatever arises by methodically asking what it is made of, what it is for, how long it lasts, and whether it is in your control.

b17e96c7299821aa.label: Serve the whole you belong to
b17e96c7299821aa.desc: Every rational being is a limb of one body, so acting for the common good is simply acting according to your own nature, and nothing that serves the whole can harm you.

09c7bdefef1a01b7.label: Do the present task justly
09c7bdefef1a01b7.desc: Attend to the act in front of you with reason, sincerity, and justice as though it were your last, undisturbed by external things or others' opinions.

bebca781dd847716.label: Contentment within oneself
bebca781dd847716.desc: The admirable person is inwardly settled — free of anger, arrogance, and craving for applause, accepting whatever comes, and needing nothing beyond what they have.

9ef5e8d3761ad656.label: Reality behind appearances
9ef5e8d3761ad656.desc: Ordinary perception cannot reach what underlies things; real understanding sees the fleeting nature of appearances and the unseen knower behind what is known.

be4e8c96e82a4f8a.label: Faith rewarded, disbelief answered
be4e8c96e82a4f8a.desc: Those who trust in God, act rightly, and give freely receive a reward beyond anything worldly, while the scornful and faithless get exactly what their choices earned.

bf3bc13d79d3cfc4.label: Every life is brief
bf3bc13d79d3cfc4.desc: Measured against endless time, a long life and a short one come to the same thing, so the things people chase, fear, and take pride in are small and quickly gone.

c6add790ddb1f30a.label: What makes a person noble
c6add790ddb1f30a.desc: The truly noble person is the one who has cut every attachment, craving, and fear, and rests unbound, serene, and awake.

09ebe41ddac5fc88.label: Strength is mastering yourself
09ebe41ddac5fc88.desc: Real strength is not force, boldness, or power over circumstance but self-mastery, and anyone ruled by their own desires is weak no matter how unyielding they appear.

9205243735d1be4b.label: Letting go ends death's fear
9205243735d1be4b.desc: When a person releases desire and the self, death loses its terror, since what remains is untouched by ending.

12ca85ef82ad1928.label: Something in you never dies
12ca85ef82ad1928.desc: The body decays but the self that animates it was never born and cannot die, so passing out of one life is only a change of form.

ab76f2443b3a3fcc.label: Devotion proven by action
ab76f2443b3a3fcc.desc: Genuine reverence shows itself in good thought, honest speech, and generous work, and it is this lived devotion, not belief alone, that brings wholeness and lasting life.

a4821accad2450c6.label: Restraint in dealing with others
a4821accad2450c6.desc: Deal with people humbly and carefully: don't mock, scheme, boast, pry, or argue your principles, but govern your own conduct first and let your actions speak.

613e03fce1ef8708.label: Pain harms only your judgment
613e03fce1ef8708.desc: Pleasure and pain belong to the body and cannot corrupt the mind unless you add the judgment that you are being harmed.

7a5a611fadde04ee.label: Character over reputation
7a5a611fadde04ee.desc: A good person cares about principle rather than praise, comfort, or advantage, and steadily rises while the small-minded flatter, hide their faults, and decline.

581f4574aa8686ef.label: Each person answers for themselves
581f4574aa8686ef.desc: A reckoning is certain and its verdict rests on the choice each person made for themselves, so decide now and keep the answer you must give in view.

cb2268043e89766e.label: Death levels and judges everyone
cb2268043e89766e.desc: Everyone dies and faces an accounting that no wealth, status, cleverness, or loved one can buy off, and each person's own record decides them.

f34a20c7f8d767ba.label: Everything changes into something else
f34a20c7f8d767ba.desc: Nature endlessly dissolves and reshapes the same matter into new forms out of one source, and seeing this makes your own dissolution nothing to fear.

d5a30c14d08b72ed.label: People shape themselves like craftsmen
d5a30c14d08b72ed.desc: As craftsmen shape their materials and sharpen their tools, a person is formed and completed through sustained study and the company of better people.

9b6f72b5856f4b28.label: Integrity outlasts wealth
9b6f72b5856f4b28.desc: Honest character brings lasting good while greed, exploitation, and the rush to get rich lead to ruin, so poverty with integrity beats prosperity without it.
